s6_p3_label: Important notice on AI-generated content and copyright:
s6_p3: AI-generated outputs may not be eligible for copyright protection under the laws of Colombia, the United States, or other jurisdictions. Current legal frameworks in many countries require human authorship for copyright eligibility. The briefs and reports provided by this Service are tools to support your creative process. The original content you create using these tools as a reference is your own work and may be eligible for copyright protection. We recommend consulting a legal professional if you have specific questions about intellectual property rights related to AI-assisted content.
s6_p4: We do not claim intellectual property rights over the AI-generated outputs delivered to you through the Service.
s7_p1: We do not use your personal data or content to train AI models. The AI features of this Service are powered by Anthropic's Claude API. Your data is processed to generate responses but is not retained by Anthropic for model training purposes under their standard API terms.
